message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Authorization token with auth_code

participant "web" as web
rectangle K8S_ZONE {
    participant "bff_web_api" as bff
    participant "authorization_api" as auth
    database "k8s_redis" as redis
}

note left of web
    Reuquest header\nContent-Type: application/json
    Request body\n- auth_code: xxxxxx
end note

web -> bff : /api/v1/auth/token
activate bff
bff -> bff : validate request

note left of bff
    Request header\nContent-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
    Request body\n- auth_code
    note:\n- handler late limit (brute force attack)
end note

bff -> auth : /api/v1/oauth/token
activate auth
auth -> auth : validate request
auth -> redis : check auth_code from k8s_redis
activate redis

note right of redis
    Key:\n- auth_code
    Redis object\n- user_id\n- scope
end note

redis -->> auth : return redis object
deactivate redis

note left of auth
    Access token:\n{\n  header\n  - alg: rsa256\n  - typ: JWT
  payload\n  - iss\n  - jti\n  - user_id\n  - iat\n  - exp\n  - roles
  signature\n}
end note

auth -> auth : generate JWT Token with private key

note left of auth
    ttl: 300000 milliseconds (5 min)\nKey: user_id:xxxxx
    Redis object value:\n- access_token\n- refrech_token
end note

auth -> redis : put user session into k8s_redis
activate redis
redis -> redis : save data
redis -->> auth : 
deactivate redis
deactivate auth

auth -->> bff : return
deactivate bff

note right of bff
    Response header\nContent-Type: application/json
    Response body\n- accessToken\n- RefreshToken
end note

bff -->> web : return

@enduml
```
